security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be altered without proper validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks input validation for vote data.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote data.
The actor can submit arbitrarily altered vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust input validation for vote data and hash verification.

description: An attacker may alter vote data to manipulate the outcome of governance proposals.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote actions may not be auditable or verifiable.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks a mechanism for non-repudiation of votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not log vote data immutably.
The system lacks strong authentication to tie votes to specific users.

mitigation.strategy: Use a blockchain with strong immutability for vote logging, implement robust user authentication and authorization.

description: An attacker may cast votes and subsequently deny having done so.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be disclosed to unauthorized actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system may lack appropriate access controls for vote data.

assumptions: The system does not encrypt or securely store vote data.
The system does not restrict access to vote data to authorized personnel.

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption of vote data at rest and in transit, implement access controls to restrict access to vote data.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive vote data.
